tasks.title: Add encryptedEnvVars to Agent type + buildAuthEnvPrefix() helper
tasks.notes: Added encryptedEnvVars?: Record<string, string> to Agent interface. Created src/utils/auth-env.ts with buildAuthEnvPrefix() supporting linux, macos (double-quoted), and windows (PowerShell single-quoted) escaping.

tasks.title: Update provisionApiKey() to store encrypted API key
tasks.notes: Added encryptPassword + updateAgent imports. After setEnv loop, stores encrypted key in agent.encryptedEnvVars via updateAgent(). Updated success message to mention 'stored in member config'.

tasks.title: Fix macOS setEnv/unsetEnv for .zshenv
tasks.notes: Added .zshenv to setEnv() (now 5 commands) and unsetEnv() (now 5 commands). .zshenv is sourced in non-interactive zsh sessions on macOS.

tasks.title: Inject auth env vars in execute_prompt
Inject auth env vars in execute_command
Add OOB API key entry to provision_auth
Verify remove_member cleanup of stored env vars
Tests: platform fixes + auth env prefix helper
